channel.title: HB 2091 - Requiring public employers under chapter 41.80 RCW to provide employee information to exclusive bargaining representatives.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍💵Kurt Spiegel - The Washington Federation of State Employees/AFSCME C28
item.description: Kurt Spiegel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Washington Federation of State Employees/AFSCME C28. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Joey Hicklin - The Washington Federation of State Employees/AFSCME C28
item.description: Joey Hicklin signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: The Week Ahead: January 12-16, 2025 | Washington State House Republicans
item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 12-16, 2025 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Workplace Standards.

item.title: LAWS - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: LAWS - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: LAWS - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LAWS - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: ❓Elizabeth New - Washington Policy Center
item.description: Elizabeth New signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Policy Center.

item.title: 👍Kati Durkin - Washington Federation of State Employees
item.description: Kati Durkin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.

item.title: 👍Joey Hicklin - WPEA
item.description: Joey Hicklin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WPEA.

item.title: And refer to Ways & Means.
item.description: And refer to Ways & Means.

item.title: LC - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LC - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.description: Kati Durkin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.description: WM - Majority; do pass with amendment(s).

item.title: Committee amendment(s) adopted with no other amendments.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
